name: momo-tools
description: Local-first capability router and safety gate for AI agent tools.

interface.shortDescription: Route agent tasks to the smallest safe capability set.
interface.longDescription: MoMo_tools keeps a local capability index, risk gates, verification levels, routing checks, and pressure tests so agents do not confuse installed tools with safe, verified tools.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use MoMo_tools to inspect the capability index and route this task safely.
